judgment.summary: Salesforce offers attractive valuation and high cash flow, though it faces slowing growth estimates and tight liquidity ratios.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 3.81 beat the 3.05 estimate by 24.9%, with the next earnings date set for 2026-05-27.
positives: Forward P/E 11.22 and PEG ratio 0.93 — indicates the company is undervalued relative to its growth profile.
Free cash flow (TTM) $16.37B — shows exceptionally strong cash generation.
Gross margin 77.7% — reflects high profitability on revenue.
Mean analyst target $268.25 — suggests significant upside potential.
negatives: Analyst growth estimate for current FY 5.5% — signals a sharp deceleration in growth compared to the 17.9% earnings growth.
Current ratio 0.76 and Quick ratio 0.64 — point to potential short-term liquidity pressure.
Total debt $17.71B — is significantly higher than the $9.56B in total cash.

news.paragraph: Salesforce is navigating mixed news as Citi lowered its price target from $200 to $188, citing concerns over weak enterprise software spending. However, the company is seeing strategic momentum through a new partnership with Moderna and a new integration from BoldSign. Options traders should weigh these macro headwinds against the company's ongoing expansion in the AI and partnership space.

headlines.title: Citi Cuts PT on Salesforce (CRM) From $200 To $188 Amid Weak Enterprise Software Spending Trends
